keys.purpose: Signs every TunnelMind Receipt v1.0 envelope produced by scry-server (the producing node). Distinct from the AUDIT_SIGNING_KEY and the ATAP witness key. Key rotation is per-concern: compromise of this key does not compromise audit logs or ATAP witness signatures.

rotation_policy.scheduled: SHOULD rotate at or before 12 months from created_at
rotation_policy.emergency: MUST rotate within 1 hour of suspected compromise; overlap window with both keys published for 24h after emergency rotation

verification.instructions: Resolve the active key whose key_id matches the receipt's signature.key_id. Verify Ed25519 signature against JCS(receipt with payload and signature.value omitted). Reject if the receipt's attestation_strength exceeds this key's attestation_strength. See https://tunnelmind.ai/standards/receipt-format/v1 §4.
